prompt.description: Cinematic text prompt. 2-15 lines of natural language is ideal (Higgsfield's prompt style). 1-4000 chars.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio. '9:16' is the default for vertical / TikTok / Reels / Shorts.

duration.description: Duration in seconds. Longer durations cost more credits.

mode.description: 'fast' is ~2x cheaper, slightly lower quality. 'std' is the default.

genre.description: Cinematic genre hint. 'auto' lets Higgsfield pick from the prompt.

start_image.description: Publicly-accessible image URL for the first frame (i2v). Triggers image-to-video mode.

end_image.description: Publicly-accessible image URL for the last frame. Both start_image and end_image can be set for a guided i2v.

rules: DO NOT pass negativePrompt — not in the seedance_2_0 schema.
DO NOT pass styleIds — Seedance generates cinematic style from the prompt + genre, not from a preset.
Higgsfield's prompt style: 2-15 lines of natural language, cinematic, with explicit camera/lighting/mood. Short product-style prompts underperform.
Default aspect_ratio for MashupForge video content: '9:16' (vertical for stories/reels/shorts).
Default duration: 5 seconds. Use 8-12s for ads / hero shots, 3-5s for stories.
Default mode: 'std'. Use 'fast' for batch generation / previews where 2x speed is worth the quality drop.
Default genre: 'auto'. Pick explicit genre only when the user asks for a specific tone.
Default resolution: '720p'. Use '1080p' for final assets (costs ~2x).
start_image: if set, the prompt is treated as the motion direction; the first frame is locked. This is the standard image-to-video path.
Higgsfield credit cost: ~10 at 5s/720p, ~20 at 10s/720p, ~40 at 5s/1080p.
